description: Merge two sorted streams of ids.
Uses len(), append(), extend(), and pop() functions.

conditions: out and left and (out[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: Checks for duplicate elements at the end of all streams.

conditions: not out or not left or (not right) or (not out[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: Handles the case when no duplicate elements are found at the end of all streams.
Iterates over the streams until one of them is fully processed.
